info.name: Search
info.description: Global ILIKE search across subjects and published question sets. Powers the ⌘K command palette.

query.description: Search query (matches subject name/code/college and published question-set title)

request.description:
Simple ILIKE search across:
- `Subject.name`, `Subject.code`, `Subject.college`
- `QuestionSet.title` (published only)

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Query params:**
- `q` — search string (empty `q` returns empty result lists)
- `limit` — 1–25, default 10. Applied independently to each result type.

**Returns:** `SearchResponse` (200):
- `query` — echoed (trimmed)
- `subjects[]` — `{ id, name, code, college, academic_year }`
- `question_sets[]` — `{ question_set_id, title, subject_id, subject_name, subject_code }`
